sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, values LIST<Double>, filter_flag BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, [1.0, 2.0, NULL], TRUE), (2, NULL, FALSE), (3, [3.0, 4.0, 5.0], TRUE);
SELECT list_cosine_similarity(values, [0.0, 1.0, 2.0]) AS cosine_sim, id FROM test_data WHERE filter_flag IS TRUE;
SELECT id, list_cosine_similarity(VALUES, [4.0, 5.0, 6.0]) AS sim FROM test_data WHERE values IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, values || [2.0, 3.0] AS extended_values FROM test_data WHERE filter_flag;
SELECT id, list_cosine_similarity(extended_values, [5.0, 5.0]) AS temp_cosine FROM temp_data HAVING temp_cosine IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, list_cosine_similarity(a.values, b.values || [NULL]) AS combined_cosine FROM test_data a JOIN test_data b ON a.id != b.id WHERE a.filter_flag AND b.filter_flag;
WITH combined AS (SELECT id, values || [9.0] AS combined_values FROM test_data WHERE filter_flag) SELECT list_cosine_similarity(combined_values, [10.0]) FROM combined;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE list_cosine_similarity(values, [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]) IS NULL;
SELECT list_cosine_similarity([NULL], [NULL]) AS null_test, list_cosine_similarity([], [1.0]) AS empty_test;
